parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  email,
  user_profile,
  program_plan,
  CASE
    WHEN week1_sent_at IS NULL THEN 1
    WHEN week2_sent_at IS NULL THEN 2
    WHEN week3_sent_at IS NULL THEN 3
    WHEN week4_sent_at IS NULL THEN 4
  END AS week_to_send
FROM leads
WHERE payment_date IS NOT NULL
  AND next_send_at IS NOT NULL
  AND next_send_at <= NOW()
  AND week4_sent_at IS NULL;

WITH picked AS ( SELECT subject, html FROM email_templates WHERE template_key = $1 AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1 ), fallback AS ( SELECT subject, html FROM email_templates WHERE template_key = 'week_1' AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1 ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT subject FROM picked), (SELECT subject FROM fallback), 'Your MDT Week Plan') AS subject, COALESCE((SELECT html FROM picked), (SELECT html FROM fallback), '

Hi {{name}}, your plan is attached.

') AS html;

UPDATE leads
SET
  week1_sent_at = CASE WHEN $2 = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE week1_sent_at END,
  week2_sent_at = CASE WHEN $2 = 2 THEN NOW() ELSE week2_sent_at END,
  week3_sent_at = CASE WHEN $2 = 3 THEN NOW() ELSE week3_sent_at END,
  week4_sent_at = CASE WHEN $2 = 4 THEN NOW() ELSE week4_sent_at END,
  next_send_at = CASE WHEN $2 < 4 THEN NOW() + interval '7 days' ELSE NULL END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1;
